steps.t: Frightened townsfolk can be found in Dínadab in northern Lamedon. You should question townsfolk about the sighting of corsairs.
The ridge that may offer a view of the Corsair camp can be found to the east of Dínadab. You should <rgb=#FF0000>look</rgb> over the ridge…
The Watchman of Dínadab can be found standing outside of his home in northern Lamedon. You should speak with the watchman.
The Watchman of Dínadab can be found standing outside of his home in northern Lamedon. You should speak with the watchman.
Gladion stands outside the Watchman's home in Dínadab in northern Lamedon. You should speak with Gladion about Fuirion.
